title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST: duration_days u32 allows absurdly large subscriptions
description: ws.rs line 1759: params.duration_days (u32) is cast to i64 and passed to chrono::Duration::days() with no upper bound check. A client can request a subscription of u32::MAX days (~11.7 million years), producing an expires_at far in the future. The subscription price is fixed regardless of duration_days, so a client paying once gets a practically infinite subscription. Fix: cap duration_days to a reasonable maximum (e.g. state.inner.subscription_days or a hardcoded max like 365) before computing expires_at.
